Related Entities

  • hospital UPMC SOMERSET 4-star overall rating
  • hospital CHAN SOON- SHIONG MEDICAL CENTER AT WINDBER 3-star overall rating
  • hospital CONEMAUGH MEYERSDALE MEDICAL CENTER
  • snf WINDBER WOODS SENIOR LIVING & REHABILITATION CTR 2-star, 127 beds
  • snf SOMERSET HEALTHCARE & REHABILITATION CENTER 1-star, 120 beds
  • snf CASSELMAN HEALTHCARE AND REHABILITATION CENTER 2-star, 99 beds
  • snf MEADOW VIEW NURSING CENTER 2-star, 150 beds
  • snf PATRIOT VILLAGE 1-star, 100 beds
  • snf LAUREL VIEW VILLAGE 4-star, 60 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
